subject: Implementation: Prompt rendering (output.go)
description:
Implement TUI rendering for interactive prompts based on Task 7 design.

Dependencies: Task 7 complete (UI patterns designed)

Files: internal/tui/claude/output.go

Implementation:
1. Add rendering functions for each prompt type
2. Apply lipgloss styling
3. Show keyboard shortcuts
4. Add awaiting indicators
5. Handle multi-line prompts

Code pattern:
```go
func (m PanelModel) renderAskUserQuestion(q AskUserQuestion) string {
    style := lipgloss.NewStyle().Border(lipgloss.RoundedBorder()).Padding(1)
    
    content := fmt.Sprintf("❓ %s\n\n", q.Question)
    for i, opt := range q.Options {
        content += fmt.Sprintf("[%d] %s\n", i+1, opt.Label)
    }
    content += "\nPress 1-4 to select, ESC to cancel"
    
    return style.Render(content)
}
```

Deliverable:
- Rendering functions for all prompt types
- Lipgloss styling
- Keyboard hint display
- Visual indicators (spinners, borders)

Acceptance:
- [ ] Prompts render clearly and attractively
- [ ] Keyboard shortcuts shown
- [ ] Awaiting state visually indicated
- [ ] No overlap with chat content
- [ ] Follows Bubbletea patterns
